creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
On Sun, Mar 15, 2009 at 10:30:14PM +0000 I heard the voice of
Edwin Groothuis, and lo! it spake thus:
>
> Maintainer of devel/bazaar-ng,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/132675 has just been submitted.

Yeesh, you sleep a little late one day...    8-}

The patch in the pr de-sorts the plist (leading to a way larger diff
than necessary).  Also, some launchpad changes somewhere along the
line make it not work quite right.  Here's an updated patch that will
do the trick:


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/cvs/ports/devel/bazaar-ng/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.42
diff -u -r1.42 Makefile
--- Makefile	14 Feb 2009 19:17:33 -0000	1.42
+++ Makefile	16 Mar 2009 03:44:12 -0000
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	bazaar-ng
-PORTVERSION=	1.12
+PORTVERSION=	1.13
 CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=	https://launchpad.net/bzr/1.12/${PORTVERSION}/+download/
+MASTER_SITES=	https://launchpadlibrarian.net/23889955/
 DISTNAME=	bzr-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	fullermd@over-yonder.net
Index: distinfo
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.35
diff -u -r1.35 distinfo
--- distinfo	14 Feb 2009 19:17:33 -0000	1.35
+++ distinfo	16 Mar 2009 03:45:30 -0000

-SHA256 (bzr-1.12.tar.gz) = 45658319296425b55ad1bb881adc27a311a5d429b3352b8088b2bdb722afe7b8
-SIZE (bzr-1.12.tar.gz) = 4001912
+MD5 (bzr-1.13.tar.gz) = f22502f43b1761da8af9a50ab429bab3
+SHA256 (bzr-1.13.tar.gz) = bd013a4ef9b5ad6a8ef2b946e11f113520893906bbb6d1142e628037c6dfda45
+SIZE (bzr-1.13.tar.gz) = 3989083
